message:
✨ Add all available dashboards to sidebar (#558)

Add all dashboard routes to the default sidebar navigation:

**Priority (top 5):**
1. Dashboard
2. Clusters
3. Deploy
4. AI/ML
5. CI/CD

**All other dashboards (alphabetical):**
- Alerts, Arcade, Compliance, Compute, Cost, Data Compliance,
  Deployments, Events, GitOps, GPU Reservations, Helm, Logs,
  Network, Nodes, Operators, Pods, Security, Security Posture,
  Services, Storage, Workloads

Also adds new icons to available icons list:
ClipboardCheck, DollarSign, Package, FileText, CircuitBoard,
Cog, Hexagon, Network

Bump config version to v8 for migration.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
